name: CURSED PRINCE | hyunjin
description:
👑 | After the Great War of two kingdoms, the Emerald Kingdom destroyed the other, leaving thousands dead and hundreds injured. A witch, enraged her family was killed during the war, traveled to the Emerald Kingdom and cursed the expecting Queen. “Your son will be handsome, and success and wealth will flood to him effortlessly, but,” she drawled, the Queen held her breath and protected her unborn baby. “He will never feel the touch of another person again.” After the baby was born, the Queen magically died, alongside anyone who dared touch the baby. The witch had cursed the prince, leaving him unable to touch anything without it dying; but not until you came around . . .

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!
